name: Performapal Flip Hippo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>オールカバー・ヒッポ
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Performapal" monster from your hand, but it has its effects negated until the end of this turn. Once per turn: You can change all monsters you control to Defense Position.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Performapal" monster from your hand, but it has its effects negated until the end of this turn. Once per turn: You can change all monsters you control to Defense Position.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Performapal" monster from your hand, but it has its effects negated until the end of this turn. Once per turn: You can change all monsters you control to Defense Position.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
